schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

schemas.name: Press & Media | Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: Media mentions, press releases, and speaking engagements. Virtual Auditor coverage in ANI, industry publications, and professional forums.

mainEntity.name: Has Virtual Auditor been featured in media?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Featured in leading business publications and wire services. Our research paper The Valuation Paradox (demonstrating 90% of Indian startup valuations are statistically indefensible) received significant attention.
Yes. Thought leadership articles on virtualauditor.in/learn/. Research papers on valuation methodology. Practice notes on regulatory changes. All freely accessible.
Media inquiries: Tushar, support@virtualauditor.in, +91 77000 89597. Expert commentary available on: startup valuations, FEMA compliance, tax appeals, forensic accounting, and regulatory changes.
Yes. CA V. Viswanathan is available for speaking engagements on valuation methodology, startup ecosystem, cross-border compliance, and forensic investigation techniques. Contact for availability.
Yes. Press releases distributed through ANI, BusinessWire, and other syndication networks. Available on virtualauditor.in and major news aggregators.
